category_sources: Official repository at https://github.com/martinpitt/umockdev is described as mocking hardware devices for tests.
source_facts.description says it mocks hardware devices for unit tests and bug reporting.
display_name_sources: Official repository name is martinpitt/umockdev at https://github.com/martinpitt/umockdev.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface at https://github.com/martinpitt/umockdev#readme.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is non-empty; per instruction repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official README documents running and debugging umockdev.
source_facts.description says mock hardware devices for unit tests and bug reporting.
source_facts.executables lists umockdev-record, umockdev-run, and umockdev-wrapper.
